en_title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Reveals New Space Combat Missions, Imminent Release Date
cn_title: 《光环：战役进化》公布太空战斗新任务与发售日
subtitle: 太空激战，经典重生
opus_summary: 《光环：战役进化》2026年7月28日登陆Xbox Series、PS5和PC。豪华版69.99美元（约合人民币500元）和收藏版199.99美元（约合人民币1430元）可提前5天游玩。新任务含太空战斗。

paragraphs.en: A new trailer for Halo: Campaign Evolved confirmed the game's release date and showed a new look at the three brand-new missions for the game.
paragraphs.cn: 《光环：战役进化》的新预告片确认了游戏的发售日期，并展示了三款全新任务的新面貌。

paragraphs.en: The trailer confirmed that the game is imminent as Halo: Campaign Evolved will release on July 28, 2026 on Xbox Series X|S, PS5, and PC. In an Xbox Wire blog post, Microsoft confirmed that players can get five-days of early access and play the game on July 23rd if they purchase the premium edition ($69.99) or collector's edition ($199.99). The base game will cost $49.99.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片证实《光环：战役进化》即将到来，将于2026年7月28日登陆Xbox Series X|S、PS5和PC。微软在Xbox Wire博文中确认，购买豪华版（69.99美元，约合人民币500元）或收藏版（199.99美元，约合人民币1430元）的玩家可提前5天于7月23日游玩。标准版售价为49.99美元（约合人民币358元）。

paragraphs.en: Instead of showing us new looks at iconic missions with a new coat of paint, the trailer focused on the new story missions known as Operation: METEORITE that were made exclusively for this remake. They'll take place one year before the events of the main game with Master Chief and Sgt. Johnson going on an exciting new mission. Perhaps more excitingly, at least one of these new missions will feature space combat. These new missions were created in collaboration with Troy Denning, who penned a number of Halo novels.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片并未展示经典任务的重制版新貌，而是聚焦于专为本作打造的全新剧情任务「Operation: METEORITE」。这些任务设定在主游戏事件发生前一年，士官长与约翰逊中士将执行一项激动人心的新任务。更令人兴奋的是，至少其中一个新任务将包含太空战斗。这些新任务由多部《光环》小说的作者Troy Denning参与创作。

paragraphs.en: As already noted, there will also be two special editions for the game. The $69.99 premium edition will include early access, in-game skins, a digital artbook, and a digital short story that leads into the events of Operation: METEORITE. The $199.99 collector's edition will include everything in the premium edition plus a 12-inch statue of Master Chief from Dark Horse, a light-up Cortana chip, a physical copy of a reimagined version of the original game's manual, a steelbook, art prints, and yes, an actual game disc (except for the PC version).
paragraphs.cn: 如前所述，游戏还将推出两个特别版。豪华版售价69.99美元（约合人民币500元），包含提前游玩、游戏内皮肤、数字艺术集以及一部引向「Operation: METEORITE」事件的数字短篇小说。收藏版售价199.99美元（约合人民币1430元），包含豪华版所有内容，外加Dark Horse出品的12英寸士官长雕像、发光科塔娜芯片、重制版原版游戏手册实体版、铁盒、艺术印刷品，以及一张实体游戏光盘（PC版除外）。

paragraphs.en: For more, be sure to check out IGN's roundup of everything announced at Xbox Showcase 2027 .
paragraphs.cn: 更多信息，请查看IGN对Xbox Showcase 2027所有公布内容的汇总。
